headline: Palisade Bio Draws Bullish Call, Lead IBD Drug Advances Toward Phase 2
summary: Analyst initiates a Buy rating on Palisade Bio with an $8 target, highlighting PALI-2108's multi-billion dollar potential in IBD treatment.

headline: Verizon Was Booted From the Dow – 5 Dividend Giants Got the Same Treatment and Eventually Soared
summary: Getting kicked off the Dow Jones Industrial Average sounds like a death sentence for a stock, but a handful of booted dividend giants went on to reward patient shareholders with stunning gains and steady income streams that index investors missed out on entirely.

headline: Amgen Inc (NASDAQ:AMGN) Shows Technical Strength and Breakout Setup
summary: Amgen (AMGN) shows strong technical health with a 7/10 rating and a high-quality 9/10 setup pattern, signaling a potential breakout from consolidation near support.
